data.content:
source3
Data source source3

source3.Project_Registry
The Project_Registry.csv table contains information about various projects, including the fiscal year they were registered in, the programming process, project status, organization details such as class and type, sector and continent names, project spending amounts, and various markers indicating the presence or absence of specific themes or types of aid. Each project is associated with a unique project number, section, and branch ID, along with detailed division and fund center information.

source3.Project_Registry.Fiscal year
Fiscal period during which the project was active. Type: object, Samples: ['2009/2010', '2009/2010', '2009/2010']

source3.Project_Registry.Programming process (new)
Stage of project programming process. Type: object, Samples: ['Uncoded: Pre-APP', 'Uncoded: Pre-APP', 'Uncoded: Pre-APP']

source3.Project_Registry.Status
Current status of the project. Type: object, Samples: ['Closed', 'Closed', 'Closed']

source3.Project_Registry.Organisation class
Classification of the organization involved in the project. Type: object, Samples: ['Individual', 'Individual', 'Individual']

source3.Project_Registry.Sector name
Sector to which the project belongs. Type: object, Samples: ['Democratic participation and civil society', 'Informal/semi-formal financial intermediaries', 'Privatization']

source3.Project_Registry.Project number
Unique identifier for the project. Type: object, Samples: ['A017716001', 'A017716001', 'A017716001']

source3.Project_Registry.Climate change adaptation (marker)
Indicator showing if the project involves climate change adaptation. Type: int64, Samples: [0, 0, 0]

source3.Project_Registry.Organisation ID
Unique identifier for the organization involved; data not available in samples. Type: object, Samples: ['Information not available', 'Information not available', 'Information not available']

source3.Project_Registry.Organisation name
Name of the organization involved; data not available in samples. Type: object, Samples: ['Information not available', 'Information not available', 'Information not available']

source3.Project_Registry.Desertification (marker)
Indicator showing if the project involves desertification efforts. Type: int64, Samples: [0, 0, 0]

source3.Project_Registry.Bilateral aid (international marker)
Indicator for bilateral aid (1 for yes, 0 for no). Type: int64, Samples: [1, 1, 1]

source3.Project_Registry.Division name
Name of the division responsible for the project. Type: object, Samples: ['OAD Asia Programming', 'OAD Asia Programming', 'OAD Asia Programming']

source3.Project_Registry.Amount spent
Total amount of money spent on the project. Type: float64, Samples: [3932.842, 5899.263000000001, 9832.105]

source3.Project_Registry.Sector percent
Percentage of the project's budget allocated to a specific sector. Type: float64, Samples: [0.2, 0.3, 0.5]

source3.Project_Registry.Section name
Name of the section associated with the project. Type: object, Samples: ['Bangladesh Section', 'Bangladesh Section', 'Bangladesh Section']

source3.Project_Registry.Project Browser country ID
Country identifier used in the project browser. Type: object, Samples: ['BD', 'BD', 'BD']

source3.Project_Registry.ICT as a tool for development (marker)
Indicator for ICT usage in development (1 for yes, 0 for no). Type: int64, Samples: [0, 0, 0]

Binary indicator for projects addressing youth issues. Type: int64, Samples: [0, 0, 0]

source3.Project_Registry.Sector ID
Unique identifier for project sectors. Type: int64, Samples: [15150, 24040, 25020]

Unique identifier for project branches. Type: object, Samples: ['B4100', 'B4100', 'B4100']

Binary indicator for projects addressing disability issues. Type: int64, Samples: [0, 0, 0]

Type of organization involved in the project. Type: object, Samples: ['Canadian Profit Making', 'Canadian Profit Making', 'Canadian Profit Making']

source3.Project_Registry.Biodiversity (marker)
Binary indicator for projects addressing biodiversity issues. Type: int64, Samples: [0, 0, 0]

source3.Project_Registry.CountryRegion percent
Percentage of project focus on a specific country or region. Type: float64, Samples: [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]

source3.Project_Registry.Untied amount(Project-level budget)
Total budget amount for the project. Type: float64, Samples: [8500267.65, 8500267.65, 8500267.65]

source3.Project_Registry.CFLI (marker)
Indicator for CFLI funding, always zero in samples. Type: int64, Samples: [0, 0, 0]

source3.Project_Registry.Regional program (marker)
Indicator for regional program involvement, always zero in samples. Type: int64, Samples: [0, 0, 0]

source3.Project_Registry.FSTC percent
Percentage value related to FSTC, consistent at 1.0 in samples. Type: float64, Samples: [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]

source3.Project_Registry.Participatory development and good governance
Indicator for participatory development, always zero in samples. Type: int64, Samples: [0, 0, 0]

source3.Project_Registry.Maximum CIDA contribution (project-level)
Maximum contribution by CIDA to the project. Type: float64, Samples: [8500267.65, 8500267.65, 8500267.65]

source3.Project_Registry.Branch name
Name of the branch handling the project. Type: object, Samples: ['OGM Asia Pacific', 'OGM Asia Pacific', 'OGM Asia Pacific']

source3.Project_Registry.Division ID
ID of the division responsible for the project. Type: object, Samples: ['D4100', 'D4100', 'D4100']

source3.Project_Registry.Fund centre ID
ID of the fund centre associated with the project. Type: int64, Samples: [4122, 4122, 4122]

source3.Project_Registry.Fund centre name
Name of the fund centre associated with the project. Type: object, Samples: ['Bangladesh', 'Bangladesh', 'Bangladesh']

source3.Project_Registry.IRTC percent
Percentage related to IRTC, likely indicating a proportion or rate. Type: float64, Samples: [0.0, 0.0, 0.0]

source3.Project_Registry.PBA type
Indicates whether the project involves PBA (Preservation Building Assessment), with 'Not PBA' meaning it does not. Type: object, Samples: ['Not PBA', 'Not PBA', 'Not PBA']

source3.Project_Registry.Enviromental sustainability (marker)
Marker for environmental sustainability, with '0' possibly indicating no sustainability measures. Type: int64, Samples: [0, 0, 0]

source4.Accounting_Snapshot
The `Accounting_Snapshot.csv` table contains financial and project-related data for various international organizations, with columns such as fiscal year, programming pattern, status, region class, project number, and budget details. Each row represents a specific project or financial snapshot, including information on funding sources, development goals, and geographical regions.

Status
Status indicates the current status of the project, such as 'Closed'.

Fiscal Year
Fiscal Year refers to the fiscal period during which a project was active.

Climate Change Adaptation
Climate Change Adaptation is a marker indicating whether a project addresses climate change adaptation.

Sector Name
Sector Name or Description identifies the sector, with examples including 'Multilateral trade negotiations', 'Sectors not specified', and 'Medical services'.<SEP>Sector Name represents the sector to which the project belongs, such as democratic participation or privatization.

Project_Registry.csv
Project_Registry.csv is a data table containing comprehensive information about various projects, including fiscal year, programming process, status, organization classification and type, sector and continent, project spending, thematic indicators, and unique identifiers for projects, sections, and branches.

Programming Process
Programming Process describes the stage of the project programming process, such as 'Uncoded: Pre-APP'.

Project Number
Project Number is a unique identifier for the project, such as 'M013170001'.<SEP>Project Number is the unique identifier for each project.

Organisation Class
Organisation Class is the classification of the organization involved in the project, including classes such as 'Individual'.

Organisation ID
Organisation ID is the unique identifier for the organization involved in the project; sometimes not available.

Division Name
Division Name is the name of the division responsible for the project, such as 'OAD Asia Programming'.

Bilateral Aid
Bilateral Aid is a binary marker indicating if a project involves bilateral aid.

Desertification
Desertification is a marker indicating whether the project involves anti-desertification efforts.

Organisation Name
Organisation Name represents the name of the organization involved in the project; sometimes not available.

Section Name
Section Name is the name of the section associated with the project, such as 'Bangladesh Section'.

Sector Percent
Sector Percent shows the percentage of the project's budget allocated to a specific sector.

Amount Spent
Amount Spent is the total expenditure on a project.

Continent Name
Continent Name refers to the continent associated with the data entry, such as 'Asia' or 'Europe'.<SEP>Continent Name refers to the continent in which the project is located, such as 'Asia'.

Project Browser Country ID
Project Browser Country ID is the country identifier used in the project browser, such as 'BD'.

Indigenous Issues
Indigenous Issues is a binary marker for projects addressing indigenous issues.

data.entity_name: ICT as a Tool for Development
data.content:
ICT as a Tool for Development
ICT as a Tool for Development is a marker indicating information and communication technology use for development.

CountryRegion Name
CountryRegion Name is the country or region where the project takes place, for example, Bangladesh.

Youth Issues
Youth Issues is a binary marker for projects addressing youth issues.

Section ID
Section ID is the unique identifier for the section associated with the project.

Sector ID
Sector ID is the unique identifier for project sectors.

Branch ID
Branch ID is the unique identifier for project branches.

CIDA Business Delivery Model
CIDA Business Delivery Model (old) refers to the type of business delivery model used, such as 'Directive'.

Children Issues
Children Issues is a binary marker for projects addressing children issues.

Disability Issues
Disability Issues is a binary marker for projects addressing disability issues.

Biodiversity
Biodiversity is a binary marker for projects addressing biodiversity issues.

Organisation Type
Organisation Type is the type of organization involved, such as 'Canadian Profit Making'.

CountryRegion Percent
CountryRegion Percent shows the percentage of project focus on a specific country or region.

Untied Amount(Project-level Budget)
Untied Amount(Project-level Budget) is the total budget allocation for the project.

CFLI
CFLI refers to a funding indicator tracked within the data, always zero in the samples provided.<SEP>CFLI is a marker indicating funding from the Canada Fund for Local Initiatives, always zero in samples.

Regional Program
Regional Program is an indicator for involvement in regional projects, with all sample values at zero.<SEP>Regional Program is a marker indicating involvement in a regional program, always zero in samples.

FSTC Percent
FSTC Percent represents a percentage value related to FSTC, consistently 1.0 in the data samples.<SEP>FSTC Percent is a percentage value related to FSTC, consistent at 1.

Aid
Aid refers to the support provided, often financial or technical, to projects, including types such as bilateral aid as indicated in the Project_Registry.csv table.

Maximum CIDA Contribution
Maximum CIDA Contribution is the highest financial contribution by CIDA to a project, with examples showing an amount of 8,500,267.65.

CIDA
CIDA is the organization making maximum contributions to projects as represented in the data.

Participatory Development And Good Governance
Participatory Development And Good Governance is an indicator for participatory development, always zero in the samples provided.

OGM Asia Pacific
OGM Asia Pacific is listed as the branch handling the projects in the provided data samples.

Division ID
Division ID is a unique identifier for the division responsible for project management, with examples such as 'D4100'.

Bangladesh
Bangladesh is the name of the fund centre linked to the project in the samples.

Fund Centre ID
Fund Centre ID is a code representing the fund centre associated with the project, e.g., 4122.

IRTC Percent
IRTC Percent is a percentage metric related to IRTC, with all examples showing 0.0.

Fiscal Year Period
Fiscal Year Period contains fiscal year information for each project, such as '2009/2010'.

PBA Type
PBA Type indicates the presence or absence of Preservation Building Assessment; 'Not PBA' in samples means no involvement.

Accounting_Snapshot.csv
Accounting_Snapshot.csv is a table containing financial and project-related data for various international organizations, including fiscal year, programming pattern, status, region class, and budget details.

Environmental Sustainability
Environmental Sustainability is a marker indicating sustainability measures for the project, with sample values of zero.

Program Processing Status
Program Processing Status gives the status of program processing, with samples like 'Uncoded: Pre-APP'.

Regional Classification
Regional Classification categorizes the regional scope of the project, e.g., 'Multilateral'.

Project Status
Project Status refers to the outcome or stage of the project, with sample value 'Closed'.

Climate Change Policy Marker
Climate Change Policy Marker is an indicator in the dataset, with all sample values at zero.

MID International Organizations
MID International Organizations is named as the division handling certain international projects.

data.entity_name: IAEA - International Atomic Energy Agency Technical Cooperation Fund
data.content:
IAEA - International Atomic Energy Agency Technical Cooperation Fund
IAEA - International Atomic Energy Agency Technical Cooperation Fund is listed as the regional standard name in the samples.

Regional Standard Code
Regional Standard Code is a code representing the regional standard relevant to the project, e.g., 1005967.

Maintenance Or Operational Expenditure Amount
Maintenance Or Operational Expenditure Amount refers to the spending on maintenance or operational costs, with examples like 75768.0.

Sector Or Division Percentage Value
Sector Or Division Percentage Value represents a percentage, with samples like 0.14, 0.505, and 0.268.

MIO United Nations
MIO United Nations is a sector or division associated with United Nations activities in the data.

Country Or Region Name
Country Or Region Name describes the specific country or region within a continent, with samples like 'Asia MC'.

Project Or Division Identifier Code
Project Or Division Identifier Code identifies a project or division, with examples like 'X3' and 'X4'.

Asia
Asia is a continent referenced as the location where the data is relevant.

Miller2_Features
Miller2_Features collectively refer to the various columns or attributes in the Accounting_Snapshot.csv table, such as program processing status, project status, regional classification, and sector name.

Fund Centre Name
Fund Centre Name is the name of the fund centre associated with the project, with sample values like 'Bangladesh'.

Europe MC
Europe MC is a country or region within the continent of Europe.

Europe
Europe is a continent referenced as the location where the data is relevant.

Asia MC
Asia MC is a country or region within the continent of Asia.

B5100
B5100 is a branch code identifier used in the dataset.

Foreign Non-Profit Making
Foreign Non-Profit Making is a regional status or type associated with the entries.

S5602
S5602 is a sector or division code used to categorize or identify sectors in the dataset.

Core Funding
Core Funding is a core business delivery model type referenced in the dataset.

UNITED NATIONS
UNITED NATIONS is an organization referenced as the region or classification of the entry.

Partner Development And Governance Involvement
Partner Development And Governance Involvement is an indicator for the involvement in partner development and governance activities.

Project Level Budget Amount
Project Level Budget Amount represents financial figures for project-level budgets, with sample values in the millions.

Knowledge For Development Involvement
Knowledge For Development Involvement is an indicator of participation in knowledge for development initiatives.

S5602 Sector Code
S5602 Sector Code is an identifier for a particular sector or division as used in the dataset.

B5100 Branch Code
B5100 Branch Code is an identifier for a particular branch as used in the dataset.

Country Or Region Code
Country Or Region Code refers to a code or identifier representing specific countries or regions in the dataset, such as 'X3' or 'X4'.

United Nations
UNITED NATIONS is classified as or associated with the regional status of Foreign Non-Profit Making.
